# DO NOT EDIT THIS FILE - It is automatically generated
# See the `tools` folder in the mod's root directory

REPLACE:CHI = { # China
	dynamic_country_name = {
		name = dyn_c_great_qing
		adjective = dyn_c_great_qing_adj

		is_main_tag_only = yes
		priority = 0

		trigger = {
			coa_def_monarchy_flag_trigger = yes
			scope:actor ?= {
				country_has_primary_culture = cu:manchu
			}
		}
	}
	dynamic_country_name = {
		name = dyn_c_empire_of_china
		adjective = dyn_c_empire_of_china_adj

		is_main_tag_only = yes
		priority = 0

		trigger = {
			scope:actor ?= {
				NOT = { country_has_primary_culture = cu:manchu }
				RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
			}
		}
	}
	dynamic_country_name = {
		name = dyn_c_peoples_republic_of_china
		adjective = CHI_ADJ

		is_main_tag_only = yes
		priority = 0

		trigger = {
			coa_def_communist_flag_trigger = yes
		}
	}
}

REPLACE:IDN = { # Majapahit
	dynamic_country_name = {
		name = dyn_c_majapahit
		adjective = dyn_c_majapahit_adj

		is_main_tag_only = yes
		priority = 0

		trigger = {
			exists = scope:actor
			scope:actor ?= {
				RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
				ruler = {
					has_culture = cu:javan
				}
			}
		}
	}

	dynamic_country_name = { # Srivijaya
		name = dyn_c_srivijaya
		adjective = dyn_c_srivijaya_adj

		is_main_tag_only = yes
		priority = 0

		trigger = {
			exists = scope:actor
			scope:actor ?= {
				RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
				ruler = {
					OR = {
						has_culture = cu:malay
						has_culture = cu:sumatran
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
}

REPLACE:JAP = { # Japan
	dynamic_country_name = {
		name = dyn_c_japan_shogunate
		adjective = dyn_c_japan_shogunate_adj

		is_main_tag_only = yes
		priority = 10

		trigger = {
			exists = scope:actor
			scope:actor ?= {
				RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
				NOT = { has_variable = meiji_var }
			}
		}
	}
	dynamic_country_name = {
		name = dyn_c_empire_of_japan
		adjective = dyn_c_empire_of_japan_adj

		is_main_tag_only = yes
		priority = 20

		trigger = {
			exists = scope:actor
			scope:actor ?= {
				RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
				has_variable = meiji_var
			}
		}
	}
}

REPLACE:KOR = { # Korea
	dynamic_country_name = { # Joseon
		name = dyn_c_korea_joseon
		adjective = dyn_c_korea_joseon_adj

		is_main_tag_only = yes
		priority = 10

		trigger = {
			exists = scope:actor
			scope:actor ?= { RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes }
		}
	}
	dynamic_country_name = { # Korean Empire
		name = dyn_c_empire_of_korea
		adjective = dyn_c_empire_of_korea_adj

		is_main_tag_only = yes
		priority = 25

		trigger = {
			exists = scope:actor
			scope:actor ?= {
				has_variable = KOR_korean_empire_declared
				RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
			}
		}
	}
}

	dynamic_country_name = { # Mahist State
		name = dyn_c_mahdist_state
		adjective = dyn_c_mahdist_state_adj

		is_main_tag_only = yes
		priority = 0

		trigger = {
			scope:actor ?= {
				has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_theocracy
			}
		}
	}

	dynamic_country_name = { # Funj
		name = dyn_c_funj_state
		adjective = dyn_c_funj_state_adj

		is_main_tag_only = yes
		priority = 0

		trigger = {
			scope:actor ?= {
				RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
			}
		}
	}
}

REPLACE:SCA = { # Scandinavia
	dynamic_country_name = { # Danish Scandinavia
		name = dyn_c_scandinavia_kalmar_union
		adjective = SCA_ADJ

		is_main_tag_only = yes
		priority = 0

		trigger = {
			exists = scope:actor
			scope:actor ?= {
				RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
				was_formed_from = DEN
			}
		}
	}

	dynamic_country_name = { # Finnish Scandinavia, somehow
		name = dyn_c_scandinavia_fennoscandia
		adjective = FIN_ADJ

		is_main_tag_only = yes
		priority = 0

		trigger = {
			exists = scope:actor
			scope:actor ?= {
				RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
				ruler = {
					has_culture = cu:finnish
				}
			}
		}
	}
}

REPLACE:ZAI = { # Azal (Zaidi State)
	dynamic_country_name = { # Zaidi
		name = dyn_c_qasimid_state
		adjective = dyn_c_qasimid_state_adj

		is_main_tag_only = yes
		priority = 0

		trigger = {
			exists = scope:actor
			scope:actor ?= {
				OR = {
					RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
					has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_theocracy
				}
			}
		}
	}
}

REPLACE:KAZ = {
	dynamic_country_name = { # Republic
		name = dyn_c_kazakh_republic
		adjective = dyn_c_kazakh_republic_adj

		is_main_tag_only = yes
		priority = 0

		trigger = {
			exists = scope:actor
			scope:actor ?= {
				NOT = {
					RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
				}
			}
			coa_def_independent_trigger = yes
		}
	}
	dynamic_country_name = { # Khanate
		name = dyn_c_kazakh_khanate
		adjective = dyn_c_kazakh_khanate_adj

		is_main_tag_only = yes
		priority = 3

		trigger = {
			exists = scope:actor
			scope:actor ?= {
				RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
			}
			coa_def_independent_trigger = yes
		}
	}
	dynamic_country_name = { # Autonomy
		name = dyn_c_kazakh_steppe_governorate_general
		adjective = dyn_c_kazakh_steppe_governorate_general_adj

		is_main_tag_only = yes
		priority = 5

		trigger = {
			exists = scope:actor
			AND = {
				exists = c:RUS
				c:RUS ?= {
					RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
					OR = {
						has_diplomatic_pact = {
							who = scope:actor
							type = puppet
							is_initiator = yes
						}
						has_diplomatic_pact = {
							who = scope:actor
							type = dominion
							is_initiator = yes
						}
						has_diplomatic_pact = {
							who = scope:actor
							type = protectorate
							is_initiator = yes
						}
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	dynamic_country_name = { # Autonomy
		name = dyn_c_kazakh_alash_autonomy
		adjective = dyn_c_kazakh_alash_autonomy_adj

		is_main_tag_only = yes
		priority = 5

		trigger = {
			exists = scope:actor
			AND = {
				exists = c:RUS
				c:RUS ?= {
					NOR = {
						RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
						has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_council_republic
					}
					OR = {
						has_diplomatic_pact = {
							who = scope:actor
							type = puppet
							is_initiator = yes
						}
						has_diplomatic_pact = {
							who = scope:actor
							type = dominion
							is_initiator = yes
						}
						has_diplomatic_pact = {
							who = scope:actor
							type = protectorate
							is_initiator = yes
						}
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
}

REPLACE:FRA = {
	dynamic_country_name = {
		name = dyn_c_french_empire
		adjective = dyn_c_french_empire_adj

		is_main_tag_only = yes
		priority = 10

		trigger = {
			exists = scope:actor
			scope:actor ?= {
				RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
				has_variable = bonapartist_restoration_var
				has_variable = one_true_french_dynasty
			}
		}
	}
	dynamic_country_name = {
		name = dyn_c_french_republic
		adjective = dyn_c_french_republic_adj

		is_main_tag_only = yes
		priority = 10

		trigger = {
			exists = scope:actor
			scope:actor ?= {
				OR = {
					has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_parliamentary_republic
					has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_presidential_republic
				}
			}
		}
	}
	dynamic_country_name = {
		name = dyn_c_french_kingdom
		adjective = dyn_c_french_kingdom_adj

		is_main_tag_only = yes
		priority = 10

		trigger = {
			exists = scope:actor
			scope:actor ?= {
				RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
				OR = {
					has_variable = orleanist_restoration_var
					has_variable = legitimist_restoration_var
				}
				has_variable = one_true_french_dynasty
			}
		}
	}
	dynamic_country_name = {
		name = dyn_c_french_commune
		adjective = dyn_c_french_commune_adj

		is_main_tag_only = yes
		priority = 10

		trigger = {
			exists = scope:actor
			scope:actor ?= {
				has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_council_republic
			}
		}
	}
}

REPLACE:HRE = {
	dynamic_country_name = {
		name = dyn_c_hre_monarchy
		adjective = dyn_c_hre_monarchy_adj

		is_main_tag_only = yes
		priority = 10

		trigger = {
			exists = scope:actor
			scope:actor ?= {
				OR = {
					RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
					has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_theocracy
				}
			}
		}
	}
	dynamic_country_name = {
		name = dyn_c_hre_monarchy_atheist
		adjective = dyn_c_hre_monarchy_atheist_adj

		is_main_tag_only = yes
		priority = 15

		trigger = {
			exists = scope:actor
			scope:actor ?= {
				OR = {
					RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
					has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_theocracy
				}
				has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_state_atheism
			}
		}
	}
	dynamic_country_name = {
		name = dyn_c_hre_republic
		adjective = dyn_c_hre_republic_adj

		is_main_tag_only = yes
		priority = 10

		trigger = {
			exists = scope:actor
			scope:actor ?= {
				OR = {
					has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_parliamentary_republic
					has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_presidential_republic
				}
			}
		}
	}
	dynamic_country_name = {
		name = dyn_c_hre_communist
		adjective = dyn_c_hre_communist_adj

		is_main_tag_only = yes
		priority = 10

		trigger = {
			exists = scope:actor
			scope:actor ?= {
				has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_council_republic
			}
		}
	}

	dynamic_country_name = {
		name = dyn_c_hre_technate
		adjective = dyn_c_hre_technate_adj

		is_main_tag_only = yes
		priority = 20

		trigger = {
			scope:actor ?= {
				OR = {
					has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_parliamentary_republic
					has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_presidential_republic
					has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_corporate_state
				}
				has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_technocracy
			}
		}
	}

	dynamic_country_name = {
		name = dyn_c_hre_fascist
		adjective = dyn_c_hre_fascist_adj

		is_main_tag_only = yes
		priority = 30

		trigger = {
			scope:actor ?= {
				coa_fascist_trigger = yes
				NOT = {
					has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_council_republic
				}
			}
		}
	}
}

REPLACE:AFG = {
	dynamic_country_name = {
		name = dyn_c_durrani_empire
		adjective = dyn_c_durrani_empire_adj

		is_main_tag_only = yes
		priority = 1

		trigger = {
			exists = scope:actor
			scope:actor = {
				RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
				was_formed_from = HER
			}
		}
	}
	dynamic_country_name = {
		name = dyn_c_peristan
		adjective = dyn_c_peristan_adj

		is_main_tag_only = yes
		priority = 1

		trigger = {
			exists = scope:actor
			scope:actor ?= {
				country_has_state_religion = rel:hindu
				was_formed_from = KAF
			}
		}
	}
}

REPLACE:CRO = {
	dynamic_country_name = {
		name = dyn_c_croatia_slavonia
		adjective = CRO_ADJ

		is_main_tag_only = yes
		priority = 1

		trigger = {
			OR = {
				AND = {
					c:AUS ?= {
						RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
					}
					scope:actor ?= {
						is_subject_of = c:AUS
					}
				}
				scope:actor = {
					RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
				}
			}
			scope:actor ?= {
				is_subject = yes
				any_scope_state = {
					state_region = s:STATE_CROATIA
				}
				any_scope_state = {
					state_region = s:STATE_SLAVONIA
				}
				NOT = {
					any_scope_state = {
						state_region = s:STATE_DALMATIA
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
}

REPLACE:KUK = {
	dynamic_country_name = {
		name = dyn_c_usga
		adjective = AUS_ADJ

		is_main_tag_only = yes
		priority = 1

		trigger = {
			exists = scope:actor
			scope:actor = {
				RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
				was_formed_from = AUS
			}
		}
	}
	dynamic_country_name = {
		name = dyn_c_kuk_communist
		adjective = KUK_ADJ

		is_main_tag_only = yes
		priority = 1

		trigger = {
			exists = scope:actor
			scope:actor ?= {
				has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_council_republic
			}
		}
	}
}

REPLACE:BUL = {
	dynamic_country_name = {
		name = dyn_c_bulgarian_empire
		adjective = dyn_c_bulgarian_empire_adj

		is_main_tag_only = yes
		priority = 1

		trigger = {
			scope:actor ?= {
				has_variable = bul_proclaimed_bulgarian_empire
				RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
			}
		}
	}
}

REPLACE:IBE = { # Iberia
	dynamic_country_name = {
		name = dyn_c_iberian_union
		adjective = IBE_ADJ

		is_main_tag_only = yes
		priority = 0

		trigger = {
			scope:actor ?= {
				OR = {
					RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
					has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_corporate_state
				}
			}
		}
	}

	dynamic_country_name = {
		name = dyn_c_esperantia
		adjective = dyn_c_esperantia_adj

		is_main_tag_only = yes
		priority = 10

		trigger = {
			scope:actor ?= {
				any_primary_culture = { # Only one primary culture
					count = 1
				}
				country_has_primary_culture = cu:iberian
				has_variable = esperantia_var
			}
		}
	}
	dynamic_country_name = {
		name = dyn_c_iberian_federation
		adjective = IBE_ADJ

		is_main_tag_only = yes
		priority = 0

		trigger = {
			scope:actor ?= {
				OR = {
					has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_presidential_republic
					has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_parliamentary_republic
					AND = {
						has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_council_republic
						NOT = {
							has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_anarchy
						}
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	dynamic_country_name = {
		name = dyn_c_iberian_confederation
		adjective = IBE_ADJ

		is_main_tag_only = yes
		priority = 0

		trigger = {
			scope:actor ?= {
				has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_council_republic
				has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_anarchy
			}
		}
	}
	dynamic_country_name = {
		name = dyn_c_iberian_concordat
		adjective = IBE_ADJ

		is_main_tag_only = yes
		priority = 0

		trigger = {
			scope:actor ?= {
				has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_theocracy
			}
		}
	}
	dynamic_country_name = {
		name = dyn_c_aggressor
		adjective = dyn_c_aggressor_adj

		is_main_tag_only = yes
		priority = 1000

		trigger = {
			scope:actor ?= {
				has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_corporate_state
				has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_single_party_state
				any_primary_culture = { # Only one primary culture
					count = 1
				}
				country_has_primary_culture = cu:iberian
			}
		}
	}
}
